name: Breakfast Casserole (Pennsylvania Dutch)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Sausage browned, cubed into 1-inch pieces
1 cup Sharp or mild Cheddar cheese shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9 x 13 inch baking dish.
2. In a large bowl, beat the eggs and mix in the milk, salt, and mustard until well combined.
3. Layer the bread cubes, sausage, and cheese at the bottom of the prepared dish.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the top of the layers.
5. Refrigerate overnight.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Bake for 45 minutes.
8. Allow to stand for about 5 minutes before cutting.
